summary: Fail closed when repository-local .go contract is missing
description: Fail closed when repository-local .go contract is missing
acceptance: Routing an existing repository without .go never returns aw-lite-fallback or points to any vault.
Router directs persistent repository work to adopt/spike and fail-closes until .go exists.
Repositories with valid .go continue routing repo-local.

evidence.summary: Fail-closed routing regression: 77 pytest tests passed; make check passed; skill quick_validate passed; missing local contract exits 1 with no vault fallback.
